seoTitle: Gowrie Park vs Granton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gowrie Park and Granton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Gowrie Park vs Granton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gowrie Park and Granton.
heading: Gowrie Park vs Granton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gowrie Park, Tasmania and Granton, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gowrie Park has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Granton (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gowrie Park or Granton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gowrie Park has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Granton scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gowrie Park scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Granton scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gowrie Park or Granton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gowrie Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
